# aaresumeTemplate — Business Flow

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:flow -->
## App launch

1. `main()` → `WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized()`
2. SDK init (Firebase, SharedPreferences, dotenv when present)
3. `runApp()` → `GetMaterialApp` / `MaterialApp`
4. Initial route from `routes.dart` / splash
